name: No witnesses to my ladder fall at work, do I have a case?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my ladder fall at work, do I have a case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, use photos, medical, report; no witnesses not fatal.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes, your medical records, photos, and incident report suffice; circumstantial evidence like ladder condition supports.[3][5]

Supervisor acknowledgment or OSHA logs help; many claims succeed without eyes.[1]

- Self-document immediately.
- Preserve ladder.
- Corroborate with gear.

Lawyer builds case from available proof; don't assume no case.[2]

description: Yes, use photos, medical, report; no witnesses not fatal.[3]
